001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
005import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData;
006import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
007import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
008import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.GoogleAuthRepository;
010import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
011import javax.inject.Inject;
012
013@HiltViewModel
014public class SignInViewModel extends ViewModel {
015
016  private final GoogleAuthRepository repository;
017  private final MutableLiveData<GoogleIdTokenCredential> credential;
018  private final MutableLiveData<Throwable> throwable;
019
020  @Inject
021  public SignInViewModel(GoogleAuthRepository repository) {
022    this.repository = repository;
023    credential = new MutableLiveData<>();
024    throwable = new MutableLiveData<>();
025  }
026
027  public LiveData<GoogleIdTokenCredential> getCredential() {
028    return credential;
029  }
030
031  public LiveData<Throwable> getThrowable() {
032    return throwable;
033  }
034
035  public void signInQuickly(Activity activity) {
036    throwable.setValue(null);
037    CompletableFuture<?> future = repository.signInQuickly(activity);
038    handleFuture(future);
039  }
040
041  public void signIn(Activity activity) {
042    throwable.setValue(null);
043    CompletableFuture<?> future = repository.signIn(activity);
044    handleFuture(future);
045  }
046
047  public void signOut() {
048    throwable.setValue(null);
049    repository
050        .signOut()
051        .thenRun(() -> credential.postValue(null))
052        .exceptionally((t) -> {
053          throwable.postValue(t);
054          return null;
055        });
056  }
057
058  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
059  private void handleFuture(CompletableFuture<?> future) {
060    ((CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential>) future)
061        .thenAccept(credential::postValue)
062        .exceptionally((t) -> {
063          throwable.postValue(t);
064          credential.postValue(null);
065          return null;
066        });
067  }
068
069}
